name: Ball 2D: Soccer Online
short_description: Ball 2D is an online multiplayer soccer game with 100% physics-based gameplay where you control one player.
detailed_description:
Ball 2D is all about reflex and strategy. Are you good enough to master the game? Play and find out. You will have tons of fun thanks to it.

Features:

  • 5 Game Modes (Soccer (Football), Real Soccer, Hockey, Tennis, Darts)
  • 24 Stadiums
  • Multiplayer (PvP/Co-Op)
  • Realistic Physics
  • T-Shirts Customization
  • Replays
  • Statistics

Play with your friends and experience great multi player coop gameplay. If you like competitive esport gaming, this game is for you. It's fast-paced, it's fun and it offers great multiplayer for casual and hardcore player. All players who like action arcade games or sport simulators will love it. Feel free to try it.
